节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Implements a system sound player that provides functions for loading, unloading, playing system sounds. Before using these functions, application must call [createSystemSoundPlayer]{@link #systemSoundManager.createSystemSoundPlayer} to create a SystemSoundPlayer instance first.

注释信息: @param { systemSoundManager.SystemSoundType } soundType - type of sound to preload.
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400105 - Crash or blocking occurs in system process.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400108 - Parameter check failed. Returned by promise.

error_codes.description: Crash or blocking occurs in system process.
Parameter check failed. Returned by promise.

注释信息: @param { systemSoundManager.SystemSoundType } soundType - type of sound to play.
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400105 - Crash or blocking occurs in system process.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400108 - Parameter check failed. Returned by promise.

error_codes.description: Crash or blocking occurs in system process.
Parameter check failed. Returned by promise.

节点.功能描述: Unloads a system sound that has been loaded before.
注释信息: @param { systemSoundManager.SystemSoundType } soundType - type of sound to unload.
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400105 - Crash or blocking occurs in system process.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400108 - Parameter check failed. Returned by promise.

error_codes.description: Crash or blocking occurs in system process.
Parameter check failed. Returned by promise.

节点.功能描述: Releases this system sound player instance.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400105 - Crash or blocking occurs in system process.

error_codes.description: Crash or blocking occurs in system process.
